tech_news.title: Here's Everything Announced During The Summer Game Fest 2026 Showcase - Game Informer
tech_news.description: From Resident Evil Veronica to Final Fantasy VII Revelation and everything in between.

tech_news.title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds announces Godzilla and Evangelion DLC - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: More DLC is on the way to Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds, with SEGA revealing new collaborations featuring Godzilla and Evangelion. Release timing will be given in the future. We also have an update on previously-announced DLC. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles is comi…

tech_news.title: Welcome Back, 47: HITMAN Classic Trilogy Remastered Revealed – Coming 2027 - XBOX Wire
tech_news.description: Saber Interactive has partnered with IOI for HITMAN Classic Trilogy Remastered, boasting enhanced visuals, improved performance, and new features, all while preserving the systems, tone, and freedom of the iconic original trilogy.

tech_news.title: IO Interactive's James Bond game 007 First Light sells 2.7 million copies in its first week, as dev reiterates free Year One content - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: IO studio director Hakan Abrak told Eurogamer the game is doing well out the gate, and has more plans for Year One.

tech_news.title: Capcom Shines Bright With Massive Reveals at Summer Game Fest 2026 - Games Press
tech_news.description: 'Resident Evil Veronica' announcement, 'Monster Hunter Wilds: Ascendance', and who to look out for in 'Street Fighter 6' Year 4.

tech_news.title: Here's When You Can Play Fortnite CH7S3 - GameRant
tech_news.description: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2 has ended, and downtime for Season 3 has begun. When does it end, and when can you jump in and play? Find out here!

tech_news.title: The Wolf Among Us 2 finally arrives next year, a decade after it was announced, but a remaster of the acclaimed original is coming first - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: It's been a long time coming but The Wolf Among Us 2 is finally launching next year, ending a tumultuous decade of development.

tech_news.title: Stellar Blade Blood Rain Revealed With Debut Trailer - IGN
tech_news.description: Shift Up has announced Stellar Blade 2 alongside a debut trailer at Summer Game Fest 2026.

tech_news.title: Grand Theft Auto VI is warping the video game release calendar - The Verge
tech_news.description: The months ahead of GTA’s November launch are becoming increasingly crowded.

tech_news.title: ‘Final Fantasy VII: Revelation’ Set to Conclude Remake Game Trilogy in 2027, First Trailer Revealed - Variety
tech_news.description: "Final Fantasy VII: Revelation" has been revealed as the third and final title in the "Final Fantasy VII" remake trilogy.
